name: Vouched
description: Vouched provides an AI-driven identity verification platform with document authentication, biometric and liveness analysis, and fraud detection APIs used by healthcare, fintech and online services.

seo.title: Vouched — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Vouched: Vouched provides an AI-driven identity verification platform with document authentication, biometric and liveness analysis, and fraud detection APIs us

when_to_use: AI document authentication for healthcare patient onboarding
Biometric liveness and face match for fintech KYC
Identity verification SDK for online service age checks
Fraud signal scoring from document consistency analysis
Selfie-to-ID match API for gig economy worker onboarding

pros: AI-driven doc and liveness verification API
Strong healthcare and telehealth customer base
US-focused ID coverage with solid accuracy
Fraud detection layered on top of KYC
cons: Smaller brand than Persona, Jumio or Onfido
Healthcare focus may not fit fintech priorities
review.verdict: Solid US-first IDV with healthcare traction; niche pick outside fintech's usual Persona/Onfido choice.
review.best_for: US healthcare, telehealth and fintech platforms needing AI document verification and liveness
review.not_for: Global products or enterprises where the dominant IDV brands deliver wider coverage and features
